calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ron Peoples, via Zoom, for Harry Beal, via Zoom, Petitioner.

The court confirms with counsel that this Trust has not been the subject of any other judicial proceeding. The court and counsel discuss whether this venue is proper. Counsel offers oral testimony and confirms that his office is the principal location of the day-to-day Administration of the trust. After additional discussion, the court advises counsel of its tentative ruling to confirm the TD Ameritrade Account but deny as to the Ally Bank as there has not been enough submitted to confirm a direct correlation between the different account numbers.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
